post_upload_blockers: Review YouTube Studio copyright and Content ID checks before public release.
Confirm altered-content disclosure in YouTube Studio for realistic generated or source-derived episode visuals.
Verify uploaded captions or automatic captions in YouTube Studio so they do not conflict with burned-in rail captions.
Configure final YouTube Studio end-screen elements for the baked three-target end-screen geometry.
Public release remains manual and must not be performed by this upload step.

snippet.description:
The Challenger Warning That Stopped Working is a Cascade Effects episode about how small signals become system consequences.

A chain of engineering warnings, schedule pressure, and normalized cold-weather risk turned one launch decision into catastrophe.

Runtime: about 20 minutes.

Cascade Effects traces failures through mechanism, incentives, and institutional blind spots.

Chapters:
0:00 Opening
0:04 Promise of routine
4:02 Pressure and normalization
8:05 The Jan. 27 reversal
12:07 Launch and visible failure
16:09 Commission and pattern
19:12 Closing

#CascadeEffects
